query:
ALTER TABLE sales 
ADD COLUMN assessedValue INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN assessedToSaleRatio VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN situsAddress TEXT,
ADD COLUMN countyName VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN bedrooms INT,
ADD COLUMN bathrooms INT,
ADD COLUMN isArmLength INT DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN isQualified INT DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN exclusionReason TEXT,
ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

ADD COLUMN isQualified INT DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN exclusionReason TEXT,
ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
